description.value:
The might of sage beasts are sealed within your Ursari bloodline, causing you to be born with unnatural size and strength. Beginning at 1st level, you count as one size category larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift. Also, increase your Hit Point total by 2, thereafter, each time you gain a level, increase your hit point total by 2.

Starting at 11th level, you count as two size categories larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift. As an action, you can spend 10 Chakra to channel your latent Sage Beast blood, growing in size becoming a Large-sized creature for 1 minute. While this size, your unarmed attacks and melee taijutsu attacks have Reach 1, you gain temporary hit points equal to your level + your Constitution modifier, and you increase your walking speed and jump distance by 10 feet each.

Lastly, at 15th level, while under the effects of your increased size, you also have resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage. Also, any creature within 5 feet of you that's hostile to you has disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you. An enemy is immune to this effect if it can't see or hear you or if it can't be frightened.
